title: A cooling device comprising a condenser cover
abstract: The present invention is a cooling device comprising a thermally-insulated body (1) and a machine room (10) wherein a compressor (60), that is connected to a refrigeration cycle cooling an inner volume enclosed by the body (1), is disposed. The cooling device comprises a tube-shaped condenser cover (40) that is connected to a compressor outlet (62) of the compressor (60) in fluid communication and that is attached to the body (1) so as to partially cover an open outer surface (14) that is defined by the machine room (10) and that can be accessed from the outside.
claims: Claims ( 13 ) A cooling device comprising a thermally-insulated body (1) and a machine room (10) wherein a compressor (60), that is connected to a refrigeration cycle cooling an inner volume enclosed by the body, is disposed, characterized by comprising a tube-shaped condenser cover (40) that is connected to a compressor outlet (62) of the compressor (60) in fluid communication and that is attached to the body (1) so as to partially cover an open outer surface (14) that is defined by the machine room (10) and that can be accessed from the outside. A cooling device as in Claim 1, characterized by the condenser cover (40) extending parallel to an outer wall of the body (1). A cooling device as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the condenser cover (40) having a grill-shaped configuration. A cooling device as in any one of the above claims, characterized by comprising a fan (50) that is fixed to the machine room (10) and that is adjusted so as to cool down both the compressor (60) and the condenser cover (40). A cooling device as in Claim 4, characterized by comprising a coil condenser (30) that is fixed in the vicinity of the fan (50) in the machine room (10) and connected so as to provide fluid communication between the compressor (60) and the condenser cover (40). A cooling device as in Claim 5, characterized by the fan (50) that is positioned in the machine room (10) such that the air is circulated through the coil condenser (30), the compressor (60) and the condenser cover (40) respectively. A cooling device as in any one of the Claims 4 to 6, characterized by the fan (50) that blows air in the machine room (10) in a direction parallel to the condenser cover (40). A cooling device as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the machine room (10) that is in the form of a cavity that is opened at the bottom portion of a rear wall (2) of the body (1), the port of which defines the open outer surface (14). A cooling device as in Claim 8, characterized by a holder (20) with one end fixed to the rear wall (2) and the other end holding the condenser cover (40). A cooling device as in Claim 9, characterized by the holder (20) that is configured to hold the condenser cover (40) parallel to the rear wall (2). A cooling device as in Claim 10, characterized by the holder (20) that is fixed to the rear wall (2) in a manner adjacent to the open outer surface (14). A cooling device as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the condenser cover (40) comprising a single-piece tube (46) that is bent so as to form arms extending parallel to each other in the horizontal direction. A cooling device as in Claim 12, characterized by the condenser cover (40) comprising an inlet (42) that is fluidly connected to an outlet (44) of the compressor (60) and that extends towards the machine room (10).
